comment: This could be really extreme with gamma-rays from synchrotron?

There is some doubt about the optical counterpart of the 1FLAT source the only two visible sources near the radio and xray sources are stars. However, we are close to the Galactic plane (b-12) and it could be that the real optical counterpart is absorbed and not visible behind a star
